name: Ek Kannada
classification_notes: The page is an EULA document for Ek Kannada, a font for the Kannada script published by EK Type; no stylistic detail is available to determine a more specific subcategory beyond its script system.
summary: A Kannada script typeface published by EK Type, available under a single-user commercial licence.
description: Ek Kannada is released by Mumbai-based EK Type, a foundry with a strong focus on Indic scripts. The licence permits installation on a single device, with separate licences required for web, app, broadcast and multi-user use. No stylistic or weight information is presented on this page, which contains only the end-user licence agreement.
foundry_blurb: EK Type's EULA for Ek Kannada grants a non-exclusive, single-user licence to install and use the font on one device, with provisions covering intellectual property ownership, embedding restrictions, third-party use, and termination, all governed by the laws of India with jurisdiction in Mumbai.
